title: Median-of-medians selection is worst-case linear
statement_informal: Any cost obeying the median-of-medians recurrence T(n) <= T(n/5) + T(7n/10) + n is at most 10n (worst-case linear selection).

cost_model.notes: The recurrence's contraction 1/5 + 7/10 = 9/10 < 1 forces linear total work.

references: Blum, Floyd, Pratt, Rivest, Tarjan (1973) — Time bounds for selection (median-of-medians / BFPRT).
